problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
